notes: WDC now owns a canonical Trace Parquet schema contract.
Trace identifiers, GTINs, SSCCs, order numbers, users, locations, and text fields are stored as text to prevent scientific notation and lost leading zeros.
Trace datetime columns are fixed as timestamps: Tid, export_window_from, export_window_to.
Trace numeric measurement columns are fixed as double: Endring primær, Endring sekundær.
Trace Excel reads now avoid pandas type inference for raw export values before canonical schema enforcement.
Trace Parquet validation now checks column order and canonical datatypes before publishing.
TraceCollector, AS400, duplicate detection, ledger behavior, and dashboard logic are unchanged.
